mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log (actor_id, action, entity_type, entity_id) VALUES (#{actorId}, #{action}, #{entityType}, #{entityId})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT created_at::date AS day FROM audit_log ORDER BY day DESC
SELECT audit_id, actor_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, created_at FROM audit_log WHERE created_at::date = #{date} ORDER BY created_at ASC
